questionHtml: Saturated aqueous hydrogen sulfide has a concentration of 0.10 mol dm−3 and a pH of 4.0. Demonstrate whether it is a strong or weak acid.
markschemeHtml:
weak AND strong acid of this concentration/[H+] = 0.1 mol dm−3 would have pH = 1
OR
weak AND [H+] = 10−4 < 0.1 «therefore only fraction of acid dissociated» ✔

meta.title: Saturated aqueous hydrogen sulfide has a concentration of 0.10 mol dm−3 and a pH of 4.0. Demonstrate whether it is a strong or weak acid.
breadcrumbLabels: 8.4 Strong and weak acids and bases
